title: Gouinia barbata
taxonomy: Gouinia barbata is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Gouinia, which is a group of plants native to the Americas. The genus Gouinia is part of the subfamily Panicoideae, which is a large and diverse group of grasses. Within the subfamily Panicoideae, Gouinia barbata is further classified as part of the tribe Paniceae. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships between different species of plants.

intro: Gouinia barbata is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, native to South America, particularly in the tropical regions of Brazil and Colombia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and inflammation, due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties.
